synopsis: Collects (not listed in reading order) Star Wars Galaxy Magazine (1994) #5-8, Star Wars: Boba Fett (1995) #1-3, Star Wars: Boba Fett (1997) #½, Star Wars: Boba Fett – Agent of Doom (2000) One-Shot, Star Wars: Boba Fett – Enemy of the Empire (1999) #1-4, Star Wars: Boba Fett – Overkill (2006) One-Shot, Star Wars: Boba Fett – Twin Engines of Destruction (1997) One-shot, Star Wars: Empire (2002) #7 & 28, and Star Wars: Underworld – The Yavin Vassilika (2000) #1-5
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Boba Fett
